    fold() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Folds the player, removing them from the current round.
    folded() - Method in record class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.PlayerRepresentation
    Returns the value of the folded record component.
